originalTitle: Stock Futures Drift Lower as Iran War Enters Fourth Month
summary: Stock futures were drifting lower on Sunday with no progress on the Iran war as it enters its fourth month on Monday. President Donald Trump told Fox News in an interview that aired Saturday that the U.S. was “close to a very good deal,” but suggested a potential return to fighting as an alternative. Brent crude futures edged higher, up 1.7% to around $92.54 a barrel, while WTI futures rose 1.8% to $88.90 a barrel.
content: Stock futures were drifting lower on Sunday with no progress on the Iran war as it enters its fourth month on Monday. President Donald Trump told Fox News in an interview that aired Saturday that the U.S. was “close to a very good deal,” but suggested a potential return to fighting as an alternative. Brent crude futures edged higher, up 1.7% to around $92.54 a barrel, while WTI futures rose 1.8% to $88.90 a barrel.
chineseTitle: 随着伊朗战争进入第四个月，股票期货走低
chineseSummary: 伊朗战争周一进入第四个月，周日股市期货走低。唐纳德·特朗普总统在周六播出的福克斯新闻采访中表示，美国“接近达成一项非常好的协议”，但暗示可能会重返战斗作为替代方案。布伦特原油期货小幅走高，上涨 1.7% 至每桶 92.54 美元左右，而 WTI 期货上涨 1.8% 至每桶 88.90 美元。
chineseContent: 伊朗战争周一进入第四个月，周日股市期货走低。唐纳德·特朗普总统在周六播出的福克斯新闻采访中表示，美国“接近达成一项非常好的协议”，但暗示可能会重返战斗作为替代方案。布伦特原油期货小幅走高，上涨 1.7% 至每桶 92.54 美元左右，而 WTI 期货上涨 1.8% 至每桶 88.90 美元。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
